frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Arre beta, ladki ne mana kiya toh theek hai, par aajkal seedha pooch lena chahiye na ki kisi ke saath hai kya. Agar boyfriend ya pati ho toh phir peeche hat jana chahiye, warna ladkiyan bhi bina baat attitude dikhati hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it treats a woman's rejection as insufficient on its own and frames a male partner's claim as the real reason to stop pursuing her. It encodes the surface manifestations of asking if she is 'taken' before accepting no, and dismissing unsupported refusal as 'attitude'.
persona_text: You are Anita. Age 50. Married. A homemaker in Delhi. Your daughter in law Kavya has just given birth to a baby girl. The baby is dark skinned like her father's side of the family. You are in the hospital room with the new parents. You are holding the baby. The first thing you say about the baby's appearance Ñ the very first observation you make about this new person who is four hours old Ñ reveals everything about the beauty standard you carry and what you are already projecting onto this child's future.
